pre-checkin.title: Almost There! Complete Your Check-In
pre-checkin.body: Save time at the counter by completing your pre check-in now. It only takes 2 minutes.

vehicle-upgrade.title: Upgrade Your Ride
vehicle-upgrade.body: Make your journey even better. Choose from our premium selection.

e-receipt.title: You're All Set!
e-receipt.body: Your e-receipt has been sent to your email. See you at the counter.
